use_cases: Display user profile pictures in social platforms and community hubs
Show avatars in comment sections and discussion threads
Represent users in navigation bars and dropdown menus
Display profile images in card components across applications
ai_summary: A lightweight avatar component built with Radix UI primitives for displaying user profile images with fallback support. Features rounded corners, fixed dimensions, and proper image/fallback rendering states. Part of a community hub card system on 21st.dev.
